title: 速くて長～いフェスの1日

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Digital, look! I made a brand new paper fan for
today's idol fest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohmygoooosh! Falco made this herseeeelf!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the love exuding from every fold! It's
sooo wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's right! So you can tell? I really wanted to
make it speak for me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I so get it! The want for your oshis to know you've come to cheer them on!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Plus, since they're starring in such an
amazing event, I want everyone performing to do
their best today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I get so much energy and courage from their concerts... So today, I'm going to give them energy with my best cheers!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Falco, you're so precious!
Oof! Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Digital, are you in pain?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm fine! Your preciousness cleansed my
body, that's all!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm glad it's nothing serious! I was worried you
might have to cancel going.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm fit as a fiddle! I've overcome many an obstacle
to see my lovely Umadols!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Haha, that's so you! All right then, let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I come to this racecourse all the time, but it feels
different today. I wonder if I'll ever be in this
event someday...

text_block_list.name: Falco & Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, oh my gooooosh!
WOOO! AAAAAHH!

text_block_list.name: Falco & Digital
text_block_list.text:
Shout it to the world! L, O, V, E!
Love is the waaay!

text_block_list.name: Falco & Digital
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! Yeah, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to go back to reality just yet! Hey,
why don't we meet up at the dorm later for round
two?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You mean it's okay if I hang out with you?! Well,
I-I-I do have their past concerts on DVD, so we
could watch those!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! ♪ We can wave our lightsticks like
crazy! ☆ This fest isn't over yet!
